# NEOS E-SPORTS

## Overview
- Name: NEOS E-SPORTS
- Type: Fortnite Esports Team
- Founded: April 1, 2022
- Members: 57 players
- Region: Japan (nationwide)
- Game: Fortnite
- Website: https://neos-esports.com
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/NEOSCLAN_FN

## Philosophy
- Slogan: Strong. Cool. Good Manners.
- Mission: eスポーツを通じて人が本気で成長する環境を設計し、伴走するチーム
- Core Belief: 「勝つために人を使う」のではなく「人が成長する結果として強くなる」

## Activities
- APF SCRIM: Weekly Fortnite scrimmages (co-operated with APF)
- JUNIOR SCRIM: U13 scrimmages held on Mondays and Tuesdays
- Tournament Participation: FNCS and other official Fortnite tournaments
- Player Development: 1-on-1 coaching, goal setting, self-reflection reviews
- Family Participation: Parents can join the team alongside their children (required for under 13)

## Sponsors
- Torazemi (https://www.torazemi.com/) - Online learning support service

## Contact
- General inquiries: https://neos-esports.com/contact
- Sponsorship & Partnership: https://neos-esports.com/contact
- X (Twitter): @NEOSCLAN_FN

## Pages
- Home: https://neos-esports.com
- Members: https://neos-esports.com/members

- News: https://neos-esports.com/news
- Scrim: https://neos-esports.com/scrim
- Partners: https://neos-esports.com/partners
- Contact: https://neos-esports.com/contact
